description_long: This advertising board features a large, rectangular display surface supported by two vertical metal poles. The display area is horizontally ribbed and appears to be made of a dark, matte material, likely designed to reduce glare and enhance visibility. The supporting poles are metallic, straight, and robust, providing stability for outdoor placement. The back of the board is plain, with the ribbed texture continuing across its surface, and no visible illumination or electronic components are present. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and clear visibility for passersby. The board is suitable for static printed advertisements or public notices in urban environments.
description: A large, ribbed rectangular advertising board with a dark display surface, supported by two sturdy metal poles. The design is utilitarian and built for outdoor urban use.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the two parallel metal poles and the ribbed back of the board.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the board and the depth of the display surface.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wide, ribbed dark surface intended for advertisements, with both support poles visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the mounting structure.
attribute_frame_design: thick metallic frame with straight edges and no decorative elements
attribute_advertisement_content: blank ribbed surface with no content
